data.body: S1 (073d) committed c94c43e8d; S2 (6642) committed 8d0d822bb (AGENTS.md 161L, Git/Gerrit 37L; CLAUDE.md 665->15L single @AGENTS.md import). Verified concurrency.md already documents store-shares-writes (auto-push/PUSH_PENDING/REBAR_SYNC_PUSH) so AGENTS.md pointer loses nothing. T7/T5e advisory (ADR) addressed by capturing the AGENTS.md-as-canonical rationale in AGENTS.md's own header (in-scope; S2 forbids docs/ writes). Now 064f: RED-first drift-guard test for templates/AGENTS.md + templates/rebar-usage.md canonical source.
